tracks.rawText: 2:26No Me Apagasv5.5A high-energy, modern pop-rock track with a driving 4/4 beat at 128 BPM, The arrangement features crunchy electric guitar power chords, a prominent synth-bass line, and bright, layered synthesizers, The drums are punchy with a heavy emphasis on the snare and a consistent eighth-note hi-hat pattern, The male vocals are energetic and melodic, utilizing a slight rasp in the higher register and supported by thick vocal harmonies in the chorus, The production is polished and loud, featuring side-chain compression on the synths and a crisp high-end sheen, The song follows a standard verse-pre-chorus-chorus structure with a bridge that builds tension through rising synth pads and drum rolls3PublishRemix
tracks.title: No Me Apagas
